scripts.verify:scripts: node --check scripts/founder-setup-report.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-setup-env-examples.mjs && node --check scripts/report-deploy-proof.mjs && node --check scripts/report-go-live.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-deployment.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-env.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-migrations.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-security-headers.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-setup-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/verify-security-headers.mjs && node scripts/verify-setup-artifacts.mjs
scripts.verify:private-beta: SAYVE_ENV_TARGET=private-beta pnpm run verify:env && pnpm run verify
scripts.verify:public-launch: SAYVE_ENV_TARGET=public-launch pnpm run verify:env && pnpm run verify
scripts.verify:deploy:strict-private-beta: SAYVE_REQUIRE_PUBLIC_READY=0 SAYVE_REQUIRE_AUTH_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_TWO_MEMBER_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_VIEWER_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_INVITE_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_BOOTSTRAP_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_OPENAI_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_PRIVACY_SMOKE=1 pnpm run verify:deploy
scripts.verify:deploy:strict-private-beta:proof: SAYVE_DEPLOY_PROOF_REPORT_PATH=outputs/setup/deploy-proof-report.json SAYVE_REQUIRE_PUBLIC_READY=0 SAYVE_REQUIRE_AUTH_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_TWO_MEMBER_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_VIEWER_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_INVITE_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_BOOTSTRAP_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_OPENAI_SMOKE=1 SAYVE_REQUIRE_PRIVACY_SMOKE=1 pnpm run verify:deploy
scripts.verify: pnpm run verify:scripts && pnpm run verify:env && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run verify:migrations && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
